cards.name: HDFC Regalia
cards.notes: 4 RPs per ₹150 base (≈0.0267, rounded to 0.03); earn cap 4,000 RPs/month; milestone lump sums: 5,000 RPs on ₹5L annual spend and 10,000 RPs on ₹8L; 1 RP = 0.5 airmile on transfer; ₹99 redemption fee per request; source: hdfcbank.com/personal/pay/cards/credit-cards/regalia-credit-card

cards.name: HDFC Millennia
cards.notes: CashPoints currency; 5% on 10 partner brands capped 1,000 CPs/month each; 1% on all other spends capped 1,000 CPs/month; flights/hotels via SmartBuy max 50% of booking value payable in points; ₹50 fee per statement credit redemption; source: hdfcbank.com/personal/pay/cards/millennia-cards/millennia-cc-new

cards.name: SBI SimplyCLICK
cards.notes: 4 RPs = ₹1; Swiggy downgraded from 10x to 5x from Apr 2025; minimum redemption changing to 4,000 RPs from Apr 2026 for statement credit; ₹99 redemption fee; source: sbicard.com/en/personal/credit-cards/rewards/simplyclick-sbi-card.page

cards.name: SBI Card PRIME
cards.notes: 2 RPs/₹100 base; birthday 20 RPs/₹100 capped 2,000 RPs/year; minimum redemption changing to 4,000 RPs from Apr 2026; ₹99 redemption fee; source: sbicard.com/en/personal/credit-cards/rewards/sbi-card-prime.page

cards.name: Axis Flipkart
cards.notes: Direct cashback card; 1 point treated as ₹1 cashback; base 1.5% on all spends; Flipkart/Cleartrip 5% capped ₹4,000/quarter; Myntra 7.5% capped ₹4,000/quarter; partner brands 4%; lounge access removed Jun 2025; auto-credited next billing cycle; source: axisbank.com/retail/cards/credit-card/flipkart-axis-bank-credit-card

cards.name: Axis Magnus
cards.notes: 12 EDGE RPs/₹200 base; 35 EDGE RPs/₹200 above ₹1.5L/month; miles transfer 5:2 ratio (5 RPs = 2 partner miles) for non-Burgundy cardholders; annual miles transfer cap: 5L RPs total (1L Group A, 4L Group B); no RPs on fuel, rent, govt, wallet, insurance, gold, utilities; points forfeited if no txn for 365 days or 30 days after card closure; source: axisbank.com/retail/cards/credit-card/magnus-credit-card

cards.name: ICICI Amazon Pay
cards.notes: Lifetime free; cashback auto-credited as Amazon Pay balance (1 RP = ₹1); no cashback on international/education transactions from Oct 2025, EMI, rent, fuel, gold; forex markup reduced to 1.99% from Oct 2025; no cap on earnings; source: icicibank.in/personal-banking/cards/credit-card/amazon-pay-credit-card.page

cards.name: ICICI Coral
cards.notes: 2 RPs/₹100 retail; 1 RP/₹100 utilities and insurance (0.5x); milestone: 2,000 bonus RPs on ₹2L annual spend + 1,000 RPs per additional ₹1L up to 10,000 bonus/year; domestic lounge access requires ₹75,000 quarterly spend; source: icicibank.in/personal-banking/cards/credit-card/coral-credit-card.page

cards.name: Kotak 811
cards.notes: 1 RP/₹100 offline base; 2 RPs/₹100 online; cash/statement value cut to ₹0.20/RP from Jun 2025 (was ₹0.25); catalogue/voucher value ₹0.25/RP; no RPs on cash advances, fuel, railway transactions; milestone: ₹750 cashback or 4 PVR tickets on ₹75,000 annual spend; source: kotak.bank.in/en/personal-banking/cards/credit-cards/811-credit-card.html

cards.name: Kotak League Platinum
cards.notes: 4 RPs/₹150 base (≈0.0267, rounded to 0.03); 8 RPs/₹150 on special categories; cash/statement value cut from ₹0.10 to ₹0.07/RP from Jun 2025; catalogue value ₹0.10/RP; milestone: 4 PVR tickets or 10,000 RPs on ₹1.25L spend per 6-month period; source: kotak.bank.in/en/personal-banking/cards/credit-cards/league-platinum-card.html

cards.name: AmEx Membership Rewards (MRCC)
cards.notes: HIGH MINIMUM: 18,000 points required to redeem — show values but warn user they cannot redeem until minimum is reached. 1 MR/₹50 on eligible spends; no RPs on fuel from Jun 12 2025, utilities, insurance, cash; hotels rate ₹0.58 based on Taj voucher via 24K Gold Collection (24,000 MR = ₹14,000); shopping rate ₹0.33 based on Amazon/Flipkart via 18K Gold Collection (18,000 MR = ₹6,000); airline transfer: 5 MR = 2 partner miles; monthly bonus: 1,000 MR on 4 txns ₹1,500; AmEx not issuing new cards to new applicants in India as of 2025; source: americanexpress.com/in/credit-cards/membership-rewards-card/

cards.name: Yes First Exclusive (YES RESERV)
cards.notes: Rebranded as YES RESERV; 6 RPs/₹200 base on select categories (insurance, education, utilities, telecom, rent); 12 RPs/₹200 offline; 24 RPs/₹200 online; flights/hotels rate based on miles transfer: 10 RPs = 1 InterMile or 1 Club Vistara point; max 1L RPs/month transferable; renewal benefit: 8,000 RPs on annual fee payment; ₹100 redemption fee; domestic lounge access requires ₹1L quarterly spend from Apr 2025; source: yes.bank.in/personal-banking/yes-first/cards/credit-card

cards.name: IDFC First Wealth
cards.notes: Lifetime free; 3 RPs/₹200 base; 10 RPs/₹200 on spend above ₹20,000/month; +33% bonus RPs on hotel bookings via IDFC FIRST app; +13% bonus RPs on flight bookings via app; reward points never expire; no RPs on fuel, govt, rent, education, wallet, insurance, utilities, EMI; ₹99 + GST redemption fee per transaction; source: idfcfirst.bank.in/credit-card/wealth

cards.name: Axis Bank Cashback
cards.notes: Replaces the discontinued Citi Cashback card (Citibank India migrated to Axis Bank Jul 2024); flat 2% cashback on online spends; 1% on offline spends; 5% on preferred partners (BigBasket, Swiggy, Zomato); cashback capped at ₹500/month on online, ₹200/month on offline; auto-credited to statement; no RPs on fuel, EMI, wallet; source: axisbank.com/retail/cards/credit-card/cashback-credit-card

cards.name: RBL Shoprite
cards.notes: 1 RP/₹100 base; 20 RPs/₹100 on grocery capped 1,000 RPs/month; no RPs on fuel, utilities, insurance, railways, wallet, quasi-cash, education, govt (from Oct 2024); welcome bonus: 2,000 RPs on first transaction within 30 days of card issuance; ₹99 + GST redemption fee (one-time per day); source: rblbank.com/personal-banking/cards/credit-cards/shoprite-credit-card
